posts.text:
🚨Sharp Money Tracker🚨
Just a few minutes from puck drop tonight. 15 games, a lot of value.. if you haven’t seen the tool. You’re in for a treat.
We’re monitoring the top bettors on prediction markets, organizing the data so you can see where their action is..
Lets catch fire tonight!!
Drop your plays below, I love a good sweat.
Enable hls playback
[Download video](https://nitter.net/video/CECC87923142E/https%3A%2F%2Fvideo.twimg.com%2Famplify_video%2F2036572394190512128%2Fvid%2Favc1%2F828x1792%2Fo5nGnjy_y3WNWtVI.mp4 "Download video")

Stop what you're doing and bookmark this. 📌
> Following these sharp wallets the last 7 days has been a gold mine..
> ✅ +13.23u ✅ 20-12 · 62.5% ✅ +12.5% ROI
> Here are the 3 they're loading tonight 👇
> ⚾ Brewers ML +101 (4u) 3 wallets · $12.5K · 82% of the sharp money.
> ⚾ Orioles ML -133 (3u) 3 proven winners — one just fired 3.2× their usual size ($11.9K). That wallet hits 65% when it pushes like that.
> ⚾ Over 9.5 Brewers/Reds (2.5u) The only total a +$329K trader touched all night.
> Tell a friend. Then come back tomorrow and check the receipts.
> Which one are you riding? 🎯

⚽ Sweden vs Japan 
> Soccer Fam!! What do we think?
> One wallet. 5-0 in soccer. It has never lost when it sizes up.
> It just put $97.7K on Japan at 2.3x its normal bet.
> I'm not calling this a lock....it's a single sharp, not a consensus. But it's the one sharp I stop and look at... and the line is moving EARLY..
> • Top 100 trader • 100% soccer win rate • +$982K lifetime P&L
> Japan opened +105 at Pinnacle. It's already -111. The market is chasing them.
> Fade the whale, or jump in? 👀

I stopped posting for 2 weeks in May.
Not because I was losing.
Because I didn't trust the numbers enough to put them in front of you.
Back since June 1 —> here's every unit since:
✅ +35.73u overall
✅ +13.23u last 7 days
✅ +5.87u yesterday
Last 7: 20-12 · 62.5% · +12.5% ROI
Most accounts post every day and pray. I'd rather go dark than sell you a number I don't believe in.
Follow if you want to watch the rest of this month play out.

Cubs and Mets was postponed..
So here is a replacement.
Orioles/Angels over 8.5 -3u
Let’s stay sharp!

Late add.
And this one comes with a real argument.
Jays ML (3u)
One ELITE top-10 MLB wallet put $41.2K on Toronto.

You do not need 10 bets to have a real edge.
You need a system that knows when to press
and when to stay disciplined.
Last 7 days:
+12.43u
19-11
63.3%
+12.6% ROI
Tonight it only gave us two...
Yankees/Tigers Under 8.5 (4u)
$41.3K behind it
100% sharp money
zero dissent
Cubs/Mets Over 8.5 (3u)
96 V12
$6.6K behind it
76% sharp money
Small card.
Big trust.

Everybody wants a full morning card.
That’s usually how people force bad bets.
This board had 8 live sides.
Only 1 actually cleared so far...
Yankees ML -129 (4u)
• 2 proven winners for, 0 against
• 3 sharp wallets on New York
• $11,271 on Yankees
• $0 on Detroit
• Pinnacle moved -121 → -127
Save this.

When you’re using the sharps.. always check back within 60 mins of gametime..
That’s when I see a lot of sharp action hitting late lines..
Here are two more..
Seattle/Red Sox under 6.5 - 2.5u
Dodgers ML - 3u

Most people spend Sunday chasing...
The sharper money usually is more discrete...
Right now it keeps coming back to these two picks..
Phillies ML -184
Under 8.5 White Sox/Tigers
Phillies is the cleaner favorite:
3 proven winners
74% of tracked sharp action
$11.9K behind it
Under 8.5
6 proven winners
$17.7K sharp money
67% of the action
one wallet sizing up 7.5x
If you can only take one, which gets your money?

The Yankees miss hurt.
but the board still finished green..
Phillies ML ✅
Marlins ML ✅
Under 7.5 ✅
So even after the biggest loss on the card,
V12 and the sharps still finished 3-1
for +2.03u on the day.
Did you stay with it after the Yankees loss?

One sharp wallet just dropped $690.9K on the Yankees.
That’s not a typo.
Yankees ML -201
4 proven MLB winners
1 HC sharp
$693.4K invested
97% of sharp money
Pinnacle moved from -187 to -200
and still confirms the play.
Are you riding with the whale
or fading a six-figure hammer?

Yesterday: 3-2 and +2u
Past 5 days:
14 wins
8 losses
+12.27u
Cumulative profit for v12..
+24.75u → +29.70
More plays on deck today.
Like this post and follow if you’re riding with the sharps.

What are we grilling this weekend.....ribeyes, burgers, or shrimp?
Because here’s how we pay for it!
Diamondbacks ML -4u
Yankees -1.5 - 4u
Over 11.5 Pirates/Rockies -3u
White Sox +1.5 -3u
That’s the card.
Diamondbacks ML is the premium favorite:
98 V12
$47.8K behind it
2 proven wallets
1 HC sharp
Yankees -1.5 is the best number:
96 V12
86% sharp money
+3.5% CLV
3 proven wallets
Over 11.5 is the loud total:
98 V12
$56.6K behind it
100% sharp money
zero dissent
Sox +1.5 is the cleaner dog:
95 V12
90% sharp money
3 proven wallets
So what’s for dinner tonight?

Everybody is about to watch Team USA and the world cup...
Meanwhile, the sharps are looking somewhere else..
After a 3-1 day yesterday, here are the 2 spots drawing real money this afternoon:
Yankees -1.5
Under 7.5 Jays/Cubs
That’s the pair.
Yankees -1.5 is the louder side:
5 spread sharps
4 MLB winners
+$3.6M combined P&L
Pinnacle confirms
Under 7.5 is the cleaner total:
3 sharp wallets
100% of sharp money
zero dissent
So what’s the sharper move today:
Yankees run line
or the under?

Another day, another sharp-money board that paid...
3-1 today.
Winners:
Mets ML ✅✅
Over 9.5 ✅✅
Under 8.5 ✅✅
Only miss:
Brewers ML
Still good for +4.09u on the day.
AGS-U V12 is now:
127-104-5
55.0%
+27.70u
Were you on the Mets, the Over, or both?

We’re 1-1 today.
Now everything sharp is pointing to one game
Mets ML +103
Over 9.5
The Mets have the bigger wallet support:
7 proven winners
2 HC sharps
$67.8K behind them
91% sharp money
Pinnacle confirms
The Over has the cleaner consensus:
2 wallets
$16.7K behind 9.5
100% sharp money
no opposition
One side.
One total.
One choice.
Which ticket are you taking?

Another one just made the board.
Brewers ML -148
2 proven MLB winners
1 HC sharp
$47.0K invested
one wallet dropped $43.5K
81% of sharp money landed on Milwaukee
Pinnacle still wants no part of it.
That’s what makes this one worth talking about.
Brewers
or Guardians?

The late-night play cashed.
Now the sharps are back this afternoon with one clear target:
Under 8.5 Jays/Sox
That’s the board so far...
4 proven MLB winners are on it.
4 wallets put $18.0K behind it.
82% of sharp money landed on 8.5.
Do you trust the sharp under
or think these bats blow it up?

Do we press our luck one more time tonight?
Over 7.5 Orioles/Mariners
1 proven MLB winner
$6.1K behind it
93% of sharp money
Last total on the board

The underdog just cashed 12-4.
Now the sharps are rolling into one more play tonight..
Sox ML -120 - 3u
That’s the add.
3 proven MLB winners
1 HC sharp
$14.2K invested
84% of tracked sharp money
But once again, there’s tension:
Pinnacle opposes the play.
We stayed hot with Miami.
Do the sharps stay hot again with Boston?

We just went 3-0 in MLB moneylines yesterday.
Now sharp money is taking an early shot on one underdog this afternoon:
Marlins ML +103
2 proven MLB winners are backing it
$6.5K is already in
85% of tracked sharp money is on Miami
Pinnacle moved against the play.
So this one comes with conflict.
Sharp dog
or sharp trap?
Which side are you on?
[Load more](https://nitter.net/Real_NHL_Savant?cursor=DAAHCgABHLipxIL__-oLAAIAAAATMjA2NzM3MjkwMjYzOTM5OTA3MQgAAwAAAAIAAA)
Appreciate you! A name I recognize from the start!
only up and to the right from here!

I'd still like a slightly larger sample..but really have been at this for 4ish months data collecting.. just v12 has this sample
> and about 8 days ago I started allowing only the highest quality picks threw the gate in order to raise our win rate..
